title: indigofera circinnata
intro: Indigofera circinnata, also known as the white indigo or white birdclimber, is a shrubby legume native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Indigofera circinnata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
